modifiers.name: Regeneration
modifiers.description: Restores HP each turn

modifiers.name: Enrage
modifiers.description: Gains bonus ATK when wounded

modifiers.name: Shield
modifiers.description: Takes reduced damage for the first few turns

modifiers.name: Summoner
modifiers.description: Periodically spawns a minion to fight alongside the boss

modifiers.name: Thorns
modifiers.description: Reflects a portion of damage taken back to the attacker

modifiers.name: Lifesteal
modifiers.description: Heals for a portion of damage dealt

modifiers.name: Berserk
modifiers.description: ATK increases every turn, stacking indefinitely

modifiers.name: Freezing Aura
modifiers.description: Chance to weaken the attacker's next hit

modifiers.name: Poison Cloud
modifiers.description: Deals poison damage to all fighters each turn

modifiers.name: Reflect
modifiers.description: Chance to fully reflect an incoming attack

modifiers.name: Fortify
modifiers.description: Gains bonus DEF while at high HP

modifiers.name: Rally
modifiers.description: ATK increases each time an ally falls in battle

modifiers.name: Execute
modifiers.description: Deals massive damage to low-HP fighters

modifiers.name: Vampiric
modifiers.description: Heals heavily when striking wounded fighters

modifiers.name: Earthquake
modifiers.description: Periodically slams the ground, damaging all fighters

modifiers.name: Lightning Storm
modifiers.description: Periodically strikes a random fighter with lightning

modifiers.name: Death Mark
modifiers.description: Marks a fighter for delayed lethal damage

modifiers.name: Iron Skin
modifiers.description: Reduces all incoming damage by a flat amount

modifiers.name: Time Warp
modifiers.description: Chance to take an extra turn

modifiers.name: Final Stand
modifiers.description: Survives the first lethal hit and enters a frenzy
